name: Sweet Monkey Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Open biscuits and cut into quarters, setting aside.
2. Mix together the sugar and cinnamon.
3. Roll each biscuit piece in the sugar mixture until well coated.
4. Place the biscuits in a buttered 13 x 9 x 2 inch cake pan.
5. Melt margarine and brown sugar separately.
6. Pour the melted mixture over the biscuits.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes.
Note: May be sprinkled with nuts.
Source: Sunburst Samplings - compiled by The Sunburst Banks of Mississippi
Contributed by Steve Breazeale
Typed for you by Nancy Coleman
